title: Inventory High-Cost Technical Debt
summary: Profiles the current debt inventory across slow tests, stale compatibility surfaces, migration residue, and duplicate authority declarations.
scope_items: Profile the current full Python suite tail and identify the worst integration hotspots.
Inventory stale compatibility imports, migration-era helpers, and duplicated authority surfaces across core and plan.
done_when_items: A ranked debt inventory exists with the first removal slices identified.
The active initiative queue can prioritize the next cleanup slices from evidence rather than intuition.
